title: dregea volubilis var. viridiflora
intro:
Dregea volubilis var. viridiflora is a variant of the Dregea volubilis plant, a type of flowering vine native to China and India, known for its beautiful greenish-white flowers and medicinal properties.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to reduce swelling, prevent infection, and relax muscles. The health benefits of Dregea volubilis var. viridiflora include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and menstrual cramps.
